findings.title: Reflected DOM XSS sink reachable from query parameter
findings.description: User-controlled query input reaches an unsafe DOM sink without encoding.
findings.remediation: Encode untrusted input before writing to the DOM and enforce a strict CSP.

findings.title: Session cookie missing Secure attribute
findings.description: Observed authenticated session cookie was set without the Secure flag.
findings.remediation: Set the Secure and HttpOnly flags for all session cookies.
